sources.title: Form EIA-860 detailed data

sources.title: United States Data Center Energy Usage Report (LBNL / DOE lineage)
sources.license_notes: Use for national energy/water context; not facility inventory.

sources.title: Data center water use context (EPA-cited national figures)

sources.license_notes: National context only; confirm specific figures against primary EPA/LBNL publications when updating aggregates.

sources.title: The Hidden Water Geography of U.S. Hyperscale Data Centers in the AI Era
sources.license_notes: Academic estimates for hyperscale cohort; external aggregate context.

sources.title: Data Center Developers Want to Build Their Own Power Plants. How Many Actually Will?
sources.license_notes: Secondary journalism on BTM pipeline; mark facility BTM as reported unless corroborated by permits/EIA.

sources.title: Google environmental / data center water disclosures
sources.license_notes: Corporate disclosure; site-level figures only when explicitly published.

sources.title: Digital Realty Northern Virginia facility public materials

sources.license_notes: For map choropleths; not facility points.

sources.license_notes: Often global/regional; use facility-level only when site-named.

sources.title: Apple $2B global command / data center in Mesa, AZ — 2015 announcement, opened 2017

sources.title: 350 E Cermak / Lakeside Technology Center, Chicago — 1.1M sq ft carrier hotel, 109 MW capacity
sources.license_notes: Press profile; capacity is total facility power, not IT load.

sources.title: Microsoft backs away from $1bn data center plans in Licking County, Ohio (New Albany, Heath, Hebron) — April 2025
sources.license_notes: Press coverage; Microsoft retains the land, so 'cancelled' reflects the announced projects, not the sites forever.

sources.title: Greenidge Generation Dresden NY — behind-the-meter bitcoin data center at 106 MW gas plant (corporate announcements, SEC-registered issuer)
sources.license_notes: Primary corporate documents from an SEC issuer; plant is EIA-registered and holds a NY Title V air permit.

sources.title: Greenidge Generation Yates County facility — Global Energy Monitor wiki profile
sources.license_notes: NGO-maintained plant profile aggregating permits and filings.
